## Summary
- [ ] Describe what changed and why.
- [ ] Confirm this description is historical (what was done), not aspirational.

## User-visible changes
- [ ] List externally observable behavior or interface changes.
- [ ] If there are no user-visible changes, explicitly state "None".

## Verification
- [ ] List the exact commands run and summarize the result of each.
- [ ] If a check was not run, explain why.

## Risk and rollback
- [ ] List key risks introduced by this PR.
- [ ] List the rollback path.

## Additional checklist
- [ ] Breaking-change status is explicitly stated.
- [ ] Docs and examples match the current behavior.
